channel.title: Posts on allokkio
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on allokkio

item.title: Open Learning 2017
item.description: Season 2 of a project, which was (and is) inspired by Una Kravets. In high school I had the epiphany that it is better to follow good teachers then good topics. Throughout my studies I tried to follow that maxim as good as possible, but forgot about it recently. This year I want to re-establish my principle once more. Books Garrett Grolemund, Hadley Wickham: R for Data Science Claus Mattheck: Die Körpersprache der Bauteile John M.

item.title: viscos
item.description: Work in Progress. viscos is my take at syncrhonising and coordinating the different efforts to build R visualisation-tools for the conceptual rainfall-runoff model COSERO. I will more about the concept soonish. Until then, feel free to explore visCOS for yourself: documentation package
